title: Fix CSS responsive breakpoint for mobile devices
original_text: Fixed the responsive layout issue on mobile devices. The breakpoint was set to 768px but some tablets were falling through. Changed the breakpoint to 1024px and adjusted the flex-direction for smaller screens. Also fixed the navigation menu overlap issue on portrait mode. Updated styles/main.css and components/navbar.css. Tested on Chrome, Firefox, and Safari mobile emulators.
expected_subject: fix(css): adjust responsive breakpoint for tablets
expected_body_lines: - Fix navigation menu overlap in portrait mode
- Validation: tested on Chrome, Firefox, Safari mobile
expected_command: git commit -m "fix(css): adjust responsive breakpoint for tablets"
